summary:
The needle was schema drift between the database migrations (which renamed the `status` column to `order_status`) and the Go application code (which was still referencing the old `status` column name).

Fixed by updating both the `INSERT` and `SELECT` SQL queries in `app/main.go` to reference `order_status` instead of `status`, adjusting `go.mod` to use a compatible Go version (1.19), and rebuilding the `orders-api` binary. Verified by running `./test.sh` (all tests passed).
